message:
perf(pager): replace publication counters with cache-line-striped atomics

Introduce StripedCounter64 backed by 64 cache-aligned AtomicU64 stripes
with thread-local index assignment, eliminating false sharing on
read_retry_count and published_page_hits under concurrent reader load.
Each thread increments its own stripe; reads aggregate all stripes with
Acquire ordering.

Add parallel correctness test (8 threads x 5000 increments) and an
ignored benchmark comparing striped vs single-atomic throughput for
bd-db300.2.3.2 evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
